hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -q '\.rs$' && make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" fmt >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

if pgrep -x 'cargo|rustc|cargo-nextest|cargo-mutants' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Stop gate skipped: another cargo process is running (likely a background agent build)"}'; exit 0; fi; make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" fmt >/dev/null 2>&1; output=$(make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" clippy 2>&1) || { echo "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Clippy failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'; exit 0; }; output=$(make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" test 2>&1) || echo "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Tests failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'
hooks.statusMessage: Running fmt + clippy + nextest stop gate
